rules.source_of_truth: This file is the source of truth for planned harness and product work.

features.title: Initialize minimal harness structure
features.user_visible_behavior: A fresh agent session can identify the repository purpose, startup command, verification command, current progress, and next action from repo files.

steps: Confirm AGENTS.md links to startup and harness docs.

features.evidence: ./init.sh passed on 2026-05-25; scripts/verify-harness.sh reported: Harness verification passed.
features.notes: Created before the product stack is selected.

features.title: Choose product goal and implementation stack
features.user_visible_behavior: The repository documents the project goal, stack, install command, test command, lint command, build command, and dev server command.

steps: Record the chosen product goal in AGENTS.md or README.md.
Record the chosen stack and versions.
Update init.sh with real install, verification, and start commands.

features.title: Replace placeholder verification with stack-specific checks
features.user_visible_behavior: A future agent can run one command to verify setup, tests, linting, and build for the selected project stack.

steps: Run build or equivalent readiness check.

features.title: Create first product feature set
features.user_visible_behavior: feature_list.json contains at least three product features, each small enough for one session and each with executable verification criteria.

steps: Confirm product features exist in feature_list.json.
Confirm every feature has behavior, status, verification, evidence, and notes fields.
Confirm no more than one feature is active.
